message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add ignore rules for core dumps, profiling data, agent config
backups, clippy output, SQLite corruption artifacts, and other
transient files that clutter git status in multi-agent environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -64,3 +64,25 @@ test_meminfo
 # Accidental shell output (stray numeric/short-name files)
 /[0-9]
 /[0-9][0-9]
+
+# Core dumps and agent config backups
+core.*
+core
+*.mcp.json.*.bak
+cline.mcp.json
+opencode.json
+windsurf.mcp.json
+clippy.txt
+clippy.json
+clippy_results.json
+clippy_unwrap.json
+clippy_unwrap_clean.txt
+check_output.txt
+.next_backup*/
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-shm
+storage.sqlite3-wal
+storage.sqlite3.bak
+storage.sqlite3.corrupt-*
+storage.sqlite3-shm.corrupt-*
+storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
